_comment: Minimal OSCAL Component Definition expressing two SDLC gates as components with their satisfied SOC 2 controls. Validate against the OSCAL schema at https://pages.nist.gov/OSCAL/. Real component-definitions go further: parameters, links to evidence artifacts, role assignments, statement-level control implementations.

components.title: change-reviewed gate
components.description: Every code or config change is reviewed and approved by someone other than the author before merge.

implemented-requirements.description: PR review by a non-author is the documented approval step for every change.
The approval record is the internal communication that the change is sanctioned.

components.title: deploy-authorized gate
components.description: Each production deploy is signed and recorded with a named authorizer.

control-implementations.description: Implements SOC 2 access and change controls at deploy time.

implemented-requirements.description: Deploy authorization is a logical access control on production.
The signed deploy record is the authorization for implementing the change.
